brief_notes: Well-structured neuroscience paper with strong quantitative tables reporting named statistical tests, effect sizes (Cohen's d, eta-squared), and SEM throughout. All table cells are numeric. However, citations rely on a small set (~15 references) with generic keys suggesting they may not all be real; the bibliography is not included so verification is impossible. Methods are adequate but some details (e.g., GCaMP signal extraction pipeline specifics) are thin.
